name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Call Claude Code from Codex for bounded, independent code review and second opinions

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code to review and critique your work.
interface.longDescription: cc-plugin-codex lets Codex call the Claude Code CLI for bounded, independent critique — code review, adversarial review, and second opinions — with read-only safety and structured findings.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to review my current diff.
Have Claude attack this plan for weaknesses.
Get an independent second opinion from Claude.
